text.title: devops-lb-haproxy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for devops-lb-haproxy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the same backend for web and API traffic with the same balancing algorithm.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Web and API traffic have different characteristics — web pages are typically fast, APIs can be slow. Round robin on mixed traffic sends slow API requests to the same servers as fast web requests, causing head-of-line blocking. Separate backends with separate algorithms allow independent tuning.

failure-mode.description: Setting timeout client and timeout server to very long values (e.g. 300s) to "avoid timeouts".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Long timeouts mask slow backends and fill the connection table with stalled connections. A stalled backend should be health-checked out of rotation, not waited on indefinitely. Configure retry behaviour instead.
